name: Shentong Robot Education Group Company Limited
summary: Shentong Robot Education Group Company Limited, an investment holding company, provides robotics education services in the People's Republic of China. It provides promotion and management services for an electronic smart card through Designated Shentong Card. The company also organizes and hosts China Robot Competition; and offers robotics training courses. In addition, it provides robot related consultancy, conference, and advertising services. The company was formerly known as China Communication Telecom Services Company Limited and changed its name to Shentong Robot Education Group Company Limited in September 2016. Shentong Robot Education Group Company Limited is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
